title: Made a couple little QOL updates to the Future Tools News page based on your feedback. 1. The TLDR summaries no longer hide the news below when hovered. 2. There's a TLDR button when viewing on mobile. 3. The header is no longer transparent, which created weird text-overlap issues. 4. Once you join the mailing list, the opt-in form to subscribe stops showing (site wide). Keep the feedback coming! I just want to make this better and more and more useful for you!

content.full_text:
Post title: Made a couple little QOL updates to the Future Tools News page based on your feedback. 1. The TLDR summaries no longer hide the news below when hovered. 2. There's a TLDR button when viewing on mobile. 3. The header is no longer transparent, which created weird text-overlap issues. 4. Once you join the mailing list, the opt-in form to subscribe stops showing (site wide). Keep the feedback coming! I just want to make this better and more and more useful for you!
